steps.title: Spot the context clue
steps.content: The phrase “he'd never tired of this specific view” emphasizes that Moss is singling out one particular view—this one Port of Oakland view, not views in general—that he's loved throughout his time there.

steps.title: Match the word to its meaning
steps.content: ”Particular” captures this exactly: a distinct, definite instance being highlighted rather than something general. The other choices (imaginary, correct, energetic) don't fit the sense of identifying a specific view Moss has singled out. That matches choice D — D is correct.
